title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Casa Grande - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Casa Grande - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Casa Grande. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Casa Grande:
Casa Grande is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Casa Grande!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
